# PricingModel

**Type**

The type of pricing model for a bid.

## Declaration

```swift
string PricingModel
```

## Discussion



## Discussion

See also [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdChannelType], [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/BillingEventType], and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Campaign] object. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-a-Campaign] and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-an-Ad-Group] for payload examples.

## Data Types

- **AdGroupDisplayStatus**: The status of the ad group.
- **AdGroupServingStateReasons**: A list of reasons that displays when an ad group isn’t running.
- **AdGroupServingStatus**: The status of whether the ad group is serving.
- **AdGroupStatus**: The status of whether the ad group is enabled or not.
- **DeviceClass**: The defined targeted audience to include by device type.
- **Gender**: The defined targeted audience in a campaign.
